intent: Product pages and narrative surfaces with strong information architecture and polished brand rhythm.
layoutRules: Use narrative section rhythm and strong editorial hierarchy.
Hero areas should show the product or offer directly.
Keep supporting content scannable and grounded in real product value.

tables: Use comparison tables with clear headings
cards: Use for repeated proof points or features
modals: Avoid modals in narrative flows unless necessary
charts: Use charts as evidence, not decoration

interactionRules: Motion should clarify transitions or product storytelling.
accessibilityRules: Large display type must remain readable.
Hero images must not obscure essential copy.
avoid: text-only hero with no product signal
imagePromptStyle: A polished product page with strong editorial hierarchy, real product UI visible in the first viewport, crisp typography, restrained accent color, narrative section rhythm, no generic gradient hero.
